channel.title: LLM Timeline — Alibaba Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Alibaba.

item.title: Qwen3.5-27B (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 27B License: open Type: model "Qwen3.5 represents a significant leap forward, integrating breakthroughs in multimodal learning, architectural efficiency, reinforcement learning scale, and global accessibility"

item.title: Qwen3.5-397B-A17B (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 397B License: open Type: model "Qwen3.5 represents a significant leap forward, integrating breakthroughs in multimodal learning, architectural efficiency, reinforcement learning scale, and global accessibility"

item.title: RynnBrain-30B-A3B (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 30B License: open Type: model Base: Qwen3-VL-30B-A3B-Instruct. "an embodied foundation model grounded in physical reality."

item.title: Qwen3-Max (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 1000B License: open Type: model "Qwen3-Max-Thinking — still under active training — is already demonstrating remarkable potential. When augmented with tool usage and scaled test-time compute, the Thinking variant has achieved 100% on challenging reasoning benchmarks such as AIME 25 and HMMT. "

item.title: Qwen3-Omni (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 30B License: open Type: model "Qwen3-Omni is a unified end-to-end model capable of processing multiple modalities, such as text, audio, image and video, and generating real-time text or speech response."... "pretraining utilizes a large-scale dataset containing approximately 2 trillion tokens, with the following distribution across modalities: text (0.57 trillion), audio (0.77 trillion), image (0.82 trillion), video (0.05 trillion), and video-audio (0.05 trillion)."

item.title: Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 80B License: open Type: model "Qwen3-Next introduces several key improvements: a hybrid attention mechanism, a highly sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) structure, training-stability-friendly optimizations, and a multi-token prediction mechanism for faster inference."

item.title: Qwen3-Max-Preview (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 1000B License: open Type: model GPQA score is SuperGPQA. "our biggest model yet, with over 1 trillion parameters"

item.title: Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507 (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 235B License: open Type: model 235B-A22B. "Qwen3 is pre-trained on 36 trillion tokens across 119 languages" MMLU score is MMLU-Redux.

item.title: Qwen3-Coder-480B-A35B-Instruct (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 480B License: open Type: model 480B-A35B.

item.title: Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct-2507 (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 235B License: open Type: model 235B-A22B. "Qwen3 is pre-trained on 36 trillion tokens across 119 languages" MMLU score is MMLU-Redux.

item.title: QwenLong-L1-32B (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 32B License: open Type: model "the first long-context LRM trained with reinforcement learniing for long-context reasoning."

item.title: ParScale (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 4.7B License: open Type: model "We introduce the third scaling paradigm for scaling LLMs: leverages parallel computation during both training and inference time (Parallel Scaling, or ParScale)... ParScale can use up to 22× less memory increase and 6× less latency increase compared to parameter scaling that achieves the same performance improvement. It can also recycle an off-the-shelf pre-trained model into a parallelly scaled one by post-training on a small amount of tokens, further reducing the training budget." MMLU shows for 1.8B models, not the 4.7B models.

item.title: Qwen3-235B-A22B (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 235B License: open Type: model Qwen3-235B-A22B. Qwen3-30B-A3B. "Qwen3 is pre-trained on 36 trillion tokens across 119 languages"

item.title: Qwen3-0.6B (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 0.6B License: open Type: model Record data ratio 60,000:1. "Qwen3 is pre-trained on 36 trillion tokens across 119 languages"

item.title: QwQ-32B (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 32B License: open Type: model Update to QwQ-32B-Preview released Nov/2024. Scores 1/5 on latest ALPrompt 2024 H2. Qwen with Question=QwQ

item.title: Babel-83B (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 83B License: open Type: model "top 25 languages by number of speakers, including English, Chinese, Hindi, Spanish, Arabic, French, Bengali, Portuguese, Russian, Urdu, Indonesian, German, Japanese, Swahili, Filipino, Tamil, Vietnamese, Turkish, Italian, Javanese, Korean, Hausa, Persian, Thai, and Burmese. These 25 languages support over 90% of the global population..."

item.title: QwQ-Max-Preview (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 325B License: open Type: model "As a sneak peek into our upcoming QwQ-Max release, this version offers a glimpse of its enhanced capabilities, with ongoing refinements and an official Apache 2.0-licensed open-source launch of QwQ-Max and Qwen2.5-Max planned soon." Announce: https://x.com/Alibaba_Qwen/status/1894130603513319842

item.title: Qwen2.5-Max (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 325B License: open Type: model "Qwen2.5-Max emerges as a milestone in MoE development, featuring an impressive 325 billion parameters. The model has been pretrained on over 20 trillion tokens and further refined with advanced post-training methodologies such as Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF)." https://wandb.ai/byyoung3/ml-news/reports/Qwen2-5-Max-Advancing-Large-Scale-Mixture-of-Expert-Models---VmlldzoxMTEyMjUyNg

item.title: QwQ-32B-Preview (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 32B License: open Type: model Scores 1/5 on latest ALPrompt 2024 H2. Qwen with Question=QwQ

item.title: Marco-o1 (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model No evals. Qwen2-7B-Instruct with a combination of the filtered Open-O1 CoT dataset, Marco-o1 CoT dataset, and Marco-o1 Instruction dataset.

item.title: Qwen2.5-Coder (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 32.5B License: open Type: model https://qwenlm.github.io/blog/qwen2.5-coder-family/ Jack Clark from Anthropic is saying it’s actually 18T tokens from Qwen2.5 + 5.5T tokens for a total of 23.5T tokens. That doesn’t seem right from my interpretation of the technical report.

item.title: Qwen2.5 (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 72B License: open Type: model

item.title: Qwen2 (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 72B License: open Type: model Instruct MMLU=82. Instruct GPQA=41.9. https://qwenlm.github.io/blog/qwen2/

item.title: Qwen2-57B-A14B (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 57B License: open Type: model https://qwenlm.github.io/blog/qwen2/

item.title: Qwen-Max (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 300B License: open Type: model https://twitter.com/JustinLin610/status/1787584325367529509

item.title: Qwen-1.5 110B (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 111B License: open Type: model Worse performance on GPQA (72B=36.3, 110B=35.9).

item.title: Qwen1.5-MoE-A2.7B (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 14.3B License: open Type: model MoE. "Of particular significance is the fact that, through upcycling, the necessity for training an equivalent volume of tokens as in the original model has been eliminated." I assumed half of the original 3T tokens

item.title: Qwen-1.5 72B (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 72B License: open Type: model

item.title: SeaLLM-13b (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 13B License: open Type: model Llama 2 for Southeast Asian (SEA) languages: Vietnamese 🇻🇳, Indonesian 🇮🇩, Thai 🇹🇭, Malay 🇲🇾, Khmer🇰🇭, Lao🇱🇦, Tagalog🇵🇭 and Burmese🇲🇲

item.title: Qwen (Alibaba)
item.description: Parameters: 72B License: open Type: model Chinese. Full name is 'Tongyi Qianwen' 通义千问. 'Lags behind both GPT-3.5 and GPT-4'. Originally 7B/14B params Apr/2023
